active_ingredients: Active Ingredients: Menthol 10.5% Purpose: Cooling Pain Relief
indications_and_usage: Uses Temporary relief from minor aches and pains of sore muscles and joints associated with: arthritis backache strains and sprains
dosage_and_administration: Directions: Adults and children 12 years of age and older: Spray on to the affected areas not more than 4 times daily; massage not necessary Children under 12 years of age: Consult physician
